name: luly-v0-2-5
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.5: brand-fidelity intake (multi-signal extraction, plausibility check, border-radius), branded placeholder data URIs (replace dead /assets paths), visible 'Back to academy' button on academy lesson screens, asset-state summary at assemble time. Earlier in v0.2: 10-stage pipeline collapsed to 5 (intake → plan → meta → style → fill → validate → assemble), per-section fill with carry-forward recap, validator agent against writing guidelines.
